title: artemisia desertorum var. tongolensis
intro: Artemisia desertorum var. tongolensis, also known as Tongol wormwood, is a plant species within the Artemisia genus, characterized by its small yellow or white flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antifungal, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Tongol wormwood include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from various respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Artemisia desertorum var. tongolensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and essential oils.
